title: Crispy Fried Cabbage with Sweet Twist
description: A sweet and crispy twist on traditional fried cabbage. This recipe uses a mixture of spices to create a unique flavor profile.
instructions: 1. Slice the cabbage into thin strips.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, stir-fry sauce, and Syrian pepper.
3. Add the cabbage to the bowl and toss to coat with the sugar mixture.
4. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the cabbage to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, or until crispy.
6. Sprinkle the crispy fried onions over the top of the cabbage.
